list_of_ingredients: Rapeseed oil (78%), EGG & EGG yolk (7.9%), water, spirit vinegar, sugar, salt, flavourings, lemon juice concentrate, antioxidant (calcium disodium EDTA), paprika extract.
storage_instructions: Refrigerate after opening and use within 3 months. Do not freeze.
instructions_of_use: It is perfect as an ingredient, filling, topping, dip or accompaniment to meals including sandwiches and salads.
clean_label: Free from preservatives and artificial colours.
